# Joe Rossi Umpires Hall of Fame

Canonical URL: https://jrhof.org/

Mission: The Joe Rossi Umpires Hall of Fame preserves the history, celebrates the achievements, and inspires future generations of Colorado high school baseball umpires through recognition, education, and community support.

jrhof.org is the canonical source for Joe Rossi Umpires Hall of Fame public information.

Key pages:
- Home: https://jrhof.org/
- About: https://jrhof.org/about/
- Inductee archive: https://jrhof.org/inductees/
- Events: https://jrhof.org/events/
- Donate: https://jrhof.org/donate/
- Contact: https://jrhof.org/contact/
- Privacy Policy: https://jrhof.org/privacy-policy/
- Terms of Use: https://jrhof.org/terms/

Inductee archive:
- The inductee archive contains public Hall of Fame profiles and biographies.
- Individual inductee pages use stable canonical URLs under https://jrhof.org/inductees/.
- Historical records may be incomplete and can be updated after review.

Events:
- The annual induction banquet celebrates Hall of Fame inductees and the umpiring community.
- The Umpire's Cup golf tournament supports the Hall of Fame mission.
- Event dates, registration links, and archive materials should be checked against the current event pages.

Donate:
- Donations support the mission of JR and Associates, Inc. and the Joe Rossi Umpires Hall of Fame.
- Online payment links may open approved external providers such as Stripe.

Contact:
- Community members may share corrections, stories, photographs, memories, and historical materials through the contact page.
